excerpt: In this post, we walk through the three pillars that make this possible: simplified setup, smarter retrieval, and production readiness. We also show you code examples for setting up a knowledge base and retrieving from it.

title: Build enterprise search for agents with Amazon Bedrock Managed Knowledge Base
